name: nedb-links
description: Identity publishing on NEDB — the developer-friendly Linktree. Claim a handle, publish everywhere. A Portal-powered application over the NEDB engine.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "portal dev" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.test: tsx --test test/renderers.test.ts test/wallet.test.ts test/electrum.test.ts test/theme.test.ts test/aggregate.test.ts test/config.test.ts test/logolayout.test.ts test/background.test.ts test/dragreorder.test.ts test/markdown.test.ts test/directory.test.ts
scripts.test:api: tsx --test test/api.test.ts test/auth.test.ts test/seedauth.test.ts test/billing.test.ts test/webhook.test.ts test/analytics.test.ts test/emailauth.test.ts test/uploads.test.ts
